name: Stream Watcher Trajectory Evaluation
description: Golden trajectories for the Stream Watcher specialist agent (D3 deliverable). Verifies: (1) the orchestrator routes video/image URIs to stream_watcher rather than answering directly, and (2) stream_watcher invokes the correct vision tool (analyze_video_clip vs analyze_image_frame) without summarizing the structured payload.

parts.text: Analyze this clip for wildlife and threat signals: gs://guardian-gfs-2026-samples/wildlife/animals.mp4

Stream Watcher analysis of gs://guardian-gfs-2026-samples/wildlife/animals.mp4: a structured event listing detected species, total animal count, behaviors, threat signals, time-of-day inference, environmental context, overall confidence, and whether the scene requires escalation. The full tool payload is returned verbatim (no summarization).
Single frame from a camera trap, what do you see? https://storage.googleapis.com/cloud-samples-data/generative-ai/image/scones.jpg

Stream Watcher analysis of the still frame at https://storage.googleapis.com/cloud-samples-data/generative-ai/image/scones.jpg. The image tool returned a structured observation event with species (empty or zero count for a non-wildlife frame), behaviors, threat signals, and overall confidence. The full tool payload is returned verbatim.
